/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/onset_interfaces/msg/launch_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
